mapper.sql: a.id, a.user_id, a.company_name, a.business_number, a.contact, a.description, a.status, a.reject_reason, a.reviewed_by, a.reviewed_at, a.created_at, a.updated_at
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO company_application (user_id, company_name, business_number, contact, description, status) VALUES (#{userId}, #{companyName}, #{businessNumber}, #{contact}, #{description}, #{status})
mapper.select: SELECT , u.email AS applicant_email, u.name AS applicant_name FROM company_application a JOIN users u ON u.id = a.user_id WHERE a.id = #{id}
SELECT FROM company_application a WHERE a.id = #{id} FOR UPDATE
SELECT FROM company_application a WHERE a.user_id = #{userId} ORDER BY a.id DESC LIMIT 1
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM company_application WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND status = 'PENDING'
mapper.update: UPDATE company_application SET status = #{status}, reject_reason = #{rejectReason}, reviewed_by = #{reviewedBy}, reviewed_at = NOW() WHERE id = #{id} AND status = 'PENDING'
mapper.select: SELECT role FROM users WHERE id = #{userId} FOR UPDATE
SELECT role FROM users WHERE id = #{userId}
mapper.update: UPDATE users SET role = #{role} WHERE id = #{userId}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO user_role_change_history (user_id, previous_role, new_role, reason, changed_by) VALUES (#{userId}, #{previousRole}, #{newRole}, #{reason}, #{changedBy})
